layer: Miss Lana / global shell and shared content
description: Correct the global public copy and shared content sources to match the approved canon while preserving the current light visual structure. Fix brand spelling, primary contact presentation, duration, included experience, travel wording, placeholders, and shared metadata. Public pricing must remain only 'From $350'; do not add tiers, package tables, calculators, or fixed travel fees.
non_goals: Do not redesign the site, change the design system, add major new Home sections, or alter page order
Do not build the Planning Your Event route
Do not implement production form delivery
Do not add reviews, real media, biographies, policies, GBP, analytics, redirects, or remove site-wide noindex
Do not publish audience-size price tiers or fixed travel surcharges
Do not rewrite eight show synopses except where a shared factual label is wrong

decision_basis.origin: User-approved seven-task implementation plan after live-site review and owner questionnaire review on 2026-06-27.
investigation_findings: The current production content contains old project-owned brand spelling in some surfaces
Shared copy still contains obsolete 35–50 minute duration and free-within-30-miles wording
The second phone must remain reserve-only and not appear as an equal public contact
The user wants the current light site retained rather than expanded into a technical-company presentation
Pricing is intentionally deferred except for 'From $350'

must_not_violate: Use Miss Lana's Fairy-Tale Theatre as the owned brand spelling
Keep generic American SEO phrases with 'theater' where they are keyword phrases rather than brand names
Use only (323) 903-2039 and info@misslanatheatre.com as primary public contacts
Keep public pricing limited to 'From $350' and custom quote language
Do not expose private address or reserve phone
Do not remove noindex in this task
Preserve Lantern Light tokens, component primitives, accessibility behavior, and current information architecture

forbidden_execution_patterns: No global search-and-replace of every occurrence of Theater/theater
No copy expansion that adds a wall of logistics to Home, cards, or show pages
No unverified claims about safety, insurance, vendor status, permissions, cancellations, or documents
No opportunistic component refactor unrelated to the copy correction
No price table or audience-size tier implementation
execution_guardrails: Prefer shared source correction over editing repeated literals independently
Keep wording concise and warm; each changed block should be no longer than necessary
Use 'about one hour' and an approximate 30-minute story plus 30-minute interactive experience
Use soft travel wording: greater Los Angeles and other California locations by custom quote
Do not remove demo-form disclosure until real delivery is implemented; replace only if an honest non-deceptive state remains
If an out-of-scope issue is found, record it in the report and do not fix it

readiness_notes: Current canon and owner decision record must be merged and authoritative

in_scope: Shared site data, global layout metadata, header/footer, shared CTA copy, contact presentation, and repeated public facts
Brand spelling correction where the project-owned name is rendered
Duration and format correction across shared surfaces
Removal of unconfirmed free-within-30-miles wording and replacement with custom-quote travel language
Removal of visible developer/preview/placeholder text where it does not serve an honest functional warning
Correction of grammar and obviously broken public sentences encountered within the declared surfaces
out_of_scope: Page-specific Birthday and School content expansion
Production email delivery and lead storage
SEO migration, old-domain redirects, GBP, Search Console, analytics, launch

steps.title: Map shared public facts and rendering sources
actions: Identify all shared data modules, metadata helpers, shell components, and repeated literals controlling brand, phone, duration, travel, price, and form status
Create a before/after inventory in the task report
steps.expectation: Each repeated public fact has one identified source or a justified page-local source

steps.title: Correct brand and contact presentation
actions: Render the owned brand consistently as Miss Lana's Fairy-Tale Theatre
Keep generic SEO keyword phrases unchanged when they are not brand references
Remove reserve phone from public header, footer, body, metadata, schema, and click actions
Verify primary phone, email, SMS, WhatsApp, and booking links use the approved contact workflow
steps.expectation: The site presents one brand spelling and one primary public phone

steps.title: Correct shared format, duration, travel, and price copy
actions: Replace obsolete 35–50 minute claims with concise approximately one-hour wording
Explain the experience as approximately 30 minutes of story plus approximately 30 minutes of games, dancing, bubbles, and interaction where appropriate
Replace fixed free-radius claims with concise custom-quote travel language
Ensure public pricing appears only as 'From $350' or equivalent approved copy
steps.expectation: Shared public facts match canon without adding technical clutter

steps.title: Remove visible implementation residue
actions: Remove public preview labels, placeholder labels, internal notes, and broken grammar from declared surfaces
Retain an honest form-unavailable notice until TUNG 5 completes if submission is not real
Do not hide non-functionality behind a false success state
steps.expectation: Public pages look intentional and truthful

steps.title: Verify shared behavior and appearance
actions: Inspect mobile and desktop header/footer/CTA/contact behavior
Review all public routes for prohibited old shared facts
steps.expectation: Global copy is correct and the existing light design is preserved

success_criteria: Every project-owned public brand rendering uses Theatre
Only (323) 903-2039 is presented as the public phone
No public route states 35–50 minutes or a guaranteed free 30-mile radius
Public pricing remains only 'From $350' with no tiers, tables, or fixed travel surcharges
No visible preview, developer, or placeholder copy remains except an honest temporary form notice where still required
The current page structure and Lantern Light design remain materially unchanged

manual_checks: Inspect Home, Shows, all service pages, Pricing, About, Booking, header, footer, metadata, and schema for brand/contact/duration/travel consistency
Confirm generic SEO uses of 'theater' were not incorrectly changed
Confirm no audience-size prices were introduced
Confirm the form still communicates its actual functional state honestly
Check phone, email, SMS, and WhatsApp actions on a narrow mobile viewport

closure_sequence: Step 1: Scope verification — confirm all steps, success_criteria, and deliverables are complete; confirm execution-safety compliance (no non_goals fixed, no forbidden_execution_patterns violated, execution_guardrails respected)
Step 2: Automated verification — run only the required_commands explicitly listed for the scoped task, confirm all pass
Step 3: Reviewer-grade pre-closure code review — analyze all changes against the review dimensions, record explicit findings with BLOCKER / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW / NOTE severity
Step 4: Closure resolution — resolve or explicitly defer findings with severity, write the final verification summary, and update the task report
Step 5: PROJECT_PROGRESS update — append the substantive change entry only after all previous closure steps pass

post_actions: Proceed to page-specific content and form implementation only after mandatory_closure passes
Do not remove the remaining honest demo-form notice until production delivery is proven
